subject: fix(structure): fix bare Cell variable reference to string literal
body:
Cell was referenced as a bare identifier instead of a string literal
in the cell controls header. This would throw ReferenceError at runtime
when a single-cell section was selected (Cell is not defined in scope).

Tags: structure, bugfix
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: layout-structure-controls
Semver: patch

title: fix bare Cell variable reference to string literal
